texto: He challenged the world with his genius, and the world defeated him by ignoring the challenge and starving him. He stopped writing because he had failed and because he had no choice but to accept the world’s terms: there is no mystery here. This was not insanity, but common sense.
explicacao: Citação de Raymond Weaver sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “He challenged the world with his genius, and the world defeated him by ignoring the challenge and…” articula reflexao, defeat, failure em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como failure e genius.

frase_original: He challenged the world with his genius, and the world defeated him by ignoring the challenge and starving him. He stopped writing because he had failed and because he had no choice but to accept the world’s terms: there is no mystery here. This was not insanity, but common sense.
